mapper.select: select role_id from sys_role where role_key = #{roleKey} and del_flag = '0' and status = '0' limit 1
select user_id from sys_user where user_name = #{userName} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user( user_name, nick_name, user_type, email, phonenumber, password, status, pwd_update_date, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{user.userName}, #{user.nickName}, '01', #{user.email}, #{user.phonenumber}, #{user.password}, #{user.status}, #{user.pwdUpdateDate}, #{user.createBy}, now(), #{user.remark} )
